title: Cronos Group Reports 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Results
text: Cronos Group reported 2025 full-year net revenue of $146.6 million, up 25% year-over-year. Gross profit reached $62.8 million, up 149% from $25.2 million in 2024. However, company reported net loss of $2.9 million versus net income of $40.0 million in 2024. Adjusted EBITDA improved to $10.1 million from negative $34.9 million. The company maintains industry leading financial position with $832 million in cash and cash equivalents and short-term investments. Q4 2025 net revenue increased 47% to $44.5 million from $30.3 million in Q4 2024. Gross profit rose 50% to $16.2 million from $10.8 million. Net loss was $0.5 million compared to net income of $43.9 million in Q4 2024. Adjusted EBITDA reached $0.5 million versus negative $7.2 million. Higher cannabis flower sales in Israel and other international markets, which carry no excise taxes, combined with expanded GrowCo production contributed to growth. Record revenue achievement for both Q4 and full-year 2025. PEACE NATURALS maintained number one cannabis brand position in Israel for eighth consecutive quarter. Pending $67 million acquisition of CanAdelaar in Netherlands expected to close H1 2026.
